notes: The Perl dumper emits weak storage records [1, value] for weak storage slots.
Valid weak records in stored-value positions load as weak storage.
Weak records in forbidden positions are rejected instead of being strengthened.
Strengthening a weak storage record during load would be a format bug.

fixtures.name: strong-only-nested-array
fixtures.description: Current Perl dumper output for [ 1, [ 2 ], "x" ]; contains only strong references.

fixtures.name: weak-root-null
fixtures.description: Weak storage record in the envelope root, which is a forbidden position.

fixtures.name: weak-array-null
fixtures.description: Structurally valid weak storage record in an Array item position.

fixtures.name: weak-array-nested-weak
fixtures.description: Nested weak storage record, which is invalid.

fixtures.name: weak-object-class
fixtures.description: Weak storage record in an object instance class field, which is a forbidden position.
